MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Appearances: Rebecca Liu, Esq. Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-3870 appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; Defendant Charles E. English, Appearing thru CourtCall, in Pro Per (210) 227-0821 and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. Plaintiff shifted burden. Defendant fails to introduce admissible evidence to carry burden to show a triable issue of fact. Order & Judgment signed in open Court.(302/AJR)Judge: A. James Robertson; Court Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620
